'''Vandelhelm: Enemies and Alloys''' was a four-part ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article series from [[March]] [[2004]], featuring [[Vandelhelm/Legends|Vandelhelm]] and other characters and settings appearing in [[Marvel Comics]]' [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' series]]. The article was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] by [[Wizards of the Coast]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: File Vandelhelm-LC/hsnn===
''…[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] briefs the captain of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]] on [[Vandelhelm/Legends|Vandelhelm's]] history and importance.''<ref name="Vandelhelm" />

===Part 2: Venerated===
''…the [[Guild Master/Legends|Guildmistress]] of Vandelhelm suspects revolutionaries among the [[Metalsmiths Guild|Metalsmiths]], and fears her policies may be the cause.''<ref name="Vandelhelm" />

===Part 3: Solo Class===
''…the Guild of Vandelhelm unveils a new freighter fleet dedicated to the man who made it all possible.''<ref name="Vandelhelm" />

===Part 4: The Demands of Supply===
''…[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]] return to Vandelhelm on a simple diplomatic mission that's sure to go smoothly.''<ref name="Vandelhelm" />
